new.name: cve-2026-31431-detection
new.description: Defensive detection package for CVE-2026-31431 (Linux kernel AF_ALG LPE). Sigma, Falco, auditd, KQL, and EQL rules mapped to MITRE ATT&CK T1068/T1611. Includes detection logic designed for auditd, eBPF, and EDR telemetry pipelines.

new.name: intel471-threat-hunting-cve-2023-46604
new.description: My first hands-on Intel 471 threat hunting workshop experience investigating CVE-2023-46604 using Elastic SIEM, vulnerability intelligence, and post-exploitation detection.

new.name: cve-2026-31431
new.description: CVE-2026-31431: Copy Fail | A minimal exploit for Linux authencesn + AF_ALG + splice() page cache write.

new.name: activemq-lockbit-analysis
new.description: Apache ActiveMQ (CVE-2023-46604) zafiyetinden LockBit ransomware aşamasına uzanan 419 saatlik sızma vakasının uçtan uca analizi, SIEM korelasyon kuralları ve IOC listesi.
